variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 84458 Hydraulic Filter | Replaces the Mahle SA051AE20000
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 84458 Hydraulic Filter | Replaces the Mahle SA051AE20000
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SH 84458 Hydraulic Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MAHLE INDUSTRIE SA051AE20000. Easy to install and replace, the SH 84458 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
